"lTlia": :- "(4) ~~~Sll't"fdCfi~q1~q<1 1 <t;'i ~. atfd+r~~Slt't"fdCfi~q1<t;q<1 1 <t;'i ~ * ~ "f!'ftm '6f; 3fcrifu f.tmftcr ~if~ '6f; "Cfi"roJT fltf t 4l"1'1 ll("flq;qi <roT'iT if Gf'1T'1T ~ * ~ ~ ~ B+ftm GCfi mcft arran: ~~ii"~~~~. .nt i1RT ~ ~~r ~ ~ ~ '6f; (~ ~ ~ '6f; ~~cf;l" ~if~~) ~~'6f; ~ R<f i!" ~~I" ~~n:rr.m-cr [ITTTrr-III/4/3lm./62/19] 'CIR ft:oraft: ~ fclfrl<is:i m.Cfi"T.f.t. 807 (ar), ~ 2011112008 ~ m~<Pr ii"~~~* m.Cfi"T.f.t. 986 (3f), ~ 20/12/2010, ~.tr. ~/~(~)11~ ~ 'httiRilt , ~ 30/05/2012, ~.tr. ~/tJ>fl{tftG1t4.~(~)/2012, ~ 13/9/2012, ~.tr . ~~ (~)/48, ~. 17/02/2014, ~.tr.~/ ~(~)/100, ~ 27/02/2014, ~.tr. ~-PffiNI/ 1/2007, ~ 01/01/2015 ~ ~.tr. ~am:oft ~(~)/110, ~ 08/01/2016 ~lffi-<r+ril"trmfimftl;Q:-m!," ~I THE PETROLEUM AND NATURAL GAS REGULATORY BOARD NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th May, 2019 F.No. PNGRB/COM/2-NGPL Tariff (3)/2019.-In exercise of the powers conferred by section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations, namely: - 1. These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Natural Gas Pipeline Tariff) Amendment Regulations, 2019. 2. They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 3. In the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Natural Gas Pipeline Tariff) Regulations, 2008,-. a. in regulation 2, in sub-regulation (1), for clause (h), the following clause shall be substituted, namely: - "(h) "tariff review" means the review of the unit natural gas pipeline tariff after every five consecutive years by the Board with the first tariff review to be done after the end of five consecutive years after the end of the initial unit natural gas pipeline tariff period as specified under clause (e): Provided that the unit natural gas pipeline tariff so determined at the time of any tariff review shall apply for the period up to the next tariff review: Provided further that the gap between two tariff reviews shall not be less than two consecutive financial years after the end of the financial year in which last tariff fixation occurred: ) -- 2 of 3 -- ) [ 'IWT Ill-~ 4) 3 Provided also that the tariff review can be done earlier in terms of provisions of sub-clause (9) of clause 9 of Schedule A."; b. in Schedule A, in clause 9, for sub-clause (4), the following sub-clause shall be substituted, namely: - "(4) The adjustment on account of variation in the provisional initial unit natural gas pipeline tariff, final initial unit natural gas pipeline tatiff and tariff determined under tariff review shall be made in the DCF calculations and the derived tariff shall be charged from the customers on prospective basis till next review, that is, the tariff shall be applicable from the first day of the month, following the month, in which the tariff order (zonal tariff in case of applicability of zonal tariff) is issued by the Board.". V ANDANA SHARMA, Secy. [Advt. Ill/4/Exty./62/19] Foot Note : The Principal regulations were notified vide GSR 807(E), dated 20/11/2008 and amended vide GSR986(E), dated 20/12/2010, F.No.PNGRB/M:(C)/11/Final Tariff Filing, dated 30/05/2012, F.No.PS/Secy./M:(C)/2012, dated 13/09/2012, F.No.PNGRB/M:(C)/48, dated 17/02/2014, F.No.PNGRB/M: (C)/100, dated 27/02/2014, F.No. L-MISCNl/I/2007, dated 01.01.2015 and F.Nq. PNGRB/M(C)/110, dated 08.01.2016. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-I I 0064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-1 10054.
